mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.preset_id, e.category, e.tool_id, t.name AS tool_name, t.url AS tool_url, t.implementation AS tool_implementation FROM preset_entry e JOIN support_tool t ON e.tool_id = t.id WHERE e.preset_id = #{presetId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO preset_entry (preset_id, category, tool_id) VALUES (#{presetId}, #{category}, #{toolId})
